URL Test Fixtures - Cytoscape Web

Base URL: http://localhost:5500
Generated: 11/17/2025, 9:20:31 AM
Total Test Cases: 18
Total Test Cases
18
Categories
7

Network IDs

Network ID - Valid Test →
Direct network access with valid network ID
Expected: Network loads successfully from URL
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/a9763574-c72f-11ed-a79c-005056ae23aa
Network ID - Import Needed Test →
Network ID not in workspace - needs import
Expected: Network is imported from NDEx via URL
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/new-network-uuid
Network ID - Invalid Test →
Non-existent network with invalid UUID
Expected: Error handling for invalid network IDs
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/invalid-uuid

Import Parameters

Import Parameter - Valid Test →
Import network from external URL
Expected: Network imports successfully from external URL
http://localhost:5500/?import=https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com%2Fnetwork.cx2
Import Parameter - Multiple Test →
Multiple network imports from URLs
Expected: Multiple networks import successfully
http://localhost:5500/?import=https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com%2Fnet1.cx2&import=https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com%2Fnet2.cx2
Import Parameter - Invalid URL Test →
Invalid import URL format
Expected: Error handling for invalid import URLs
http://localhost:5500/?import=not-a-valid-url
Import Parameter - Invalid CX Test →
Valid URL but invalid CX format
Expected: Validation error handling for invalid CX
http://localhost:5500/?import=https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com%2Finvalid-cx.cx2

State - Selection

State - Selected Nodes Test →
Pre-select nodes from URL
Expected: Node selection is restored from URL
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/net-456?selectednodes=node1+node2+node3
State - Selected Edges Test →
Pre-select edges from URL
Expected: Edge selection is restored from URL
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/net-456?selectededges=edge1+edge2
State - Selected Both Test →
Pre-select both nodes and edges
Expected: Combined selection state is restored
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/net-456?selectednodes=n1+n2&selectededges=e1

State - Filter

State - Filter Test →
Pre-apply filters from URL
Expected: Filter state is restored from URL
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/net-456?filterFor=node&filterBy=type&filterRange=protein

State - UI

State - Panels Test →
Pre-open/close panels from URL
Expected: Panel states are restored from URL
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/net-456?left=open&right=closed&bottom=open
State - Active Network View Test →
Pre-select network view from URL
Expected: Network view selection is restored
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/net-456?activeNetworkView=view-1
State - Table Browser Tab Test →
Pre-select table browser tab from URL
Expected: Table browser tab selection is restored
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/net-456?activeTableBrowserTab=1
State - Network View Tab Test →
Pre-select network view tab from URL
Expected: Network view tab selection is restored
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/net-456?activeNetworkViewTab=1

State - Combined

State - Complete Test →
All state parameters combined
Expected: Complete state restoration from URL
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/net-456?selectednodes=n1+n2&selectededges=e1&filterFor=node&filterBy=type&left=open&right=closed&activeNetworkView=view-1&activeNetworkViewTab=1&activeTableBrowserTab=1

Invalid URLs

Invalid - Workspace ID Test →
Malformed workspace ID format
Expected: Workspace ID validation error
http://localhost:5500/invalid-workspace-123!/networks/network-456
Invalid - Network ID Test →
Malformed network ID format
Expected: Network ID validation error
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/not-a-valid-uuid
Invalid - Query Params Test →
Malformed query parameter format
Expected: Query parameter parsing error
http://localhost:5500/workspace-123/networks/network-456?invalid=param&format&missingValue=
